arts.ttl: Mourinho ruled out of running for Everton job
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has been ruled out of the running to replace Sean Dyche as Everton manager. Everton announced the decision to sack Dyche on Thursday with the club just a point above the relegation places. The Toffees have won just one of their last 11 games in all competitions and have scored just once in […] The post Mourinho ruled out of running for Everton job first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manager with nine trophies who Pep Guardiola called 'amazing' could replace Sean Dyche at Everton
Everton vs Peterborough – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Everton host Peterborough United in the last-ever FA Cup third-round tie at Goodison Park tonight. The Toffees announced in the hours before the game that manager Sean Dyche has been relieved of his duties. Under-18 manager Leighton Baines and club captain Seamus Coleman have taken charge on an interim basis 🚨🔵 Leighton Baines & Seamus […] The post Everton vs Peterborough – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
